mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.article_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.commentator_id, c.commentator_name, u.avatar as user_avatar, c.reply_to_id, c.reply_to_name, c.like_count, c.status, c.del_flag, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time FROM psi_blog_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_blog_user u ON c.commentator_id = u.id WHERE c.article_id = #{articleId} AND c.del_flag = '0' AND c.status = '1' AND (c.parent_id IS NULL OR c.parent_id = '') ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.article_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.commentator_id, c.commentator_name, u.avatar as user_avatar, c.reply_to_id, c.reply_to_name, c.like_count, c.status, c.del_flag, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time FROM psi_blog_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_blog_user u ON c.commentator_id = u.id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.del_flag = '0' AND c.status = '1' ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
